/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -g --coverage CMakeFiles/glial_tests.dir/test_astrocytes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glial_tests.dir/test_oligodendrocytes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glial_tests.dir/test_microglia.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glial_tests.dir/test_glial_integration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glial_tests.dir/__/python/nimcp_module.c.o -o glial_tests  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bbrelin/src/repos/nimcp/src/lib ../lib/libnimcp_core.so.2.5.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so -lpthread -llz4 -ljansson /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
